ev-bathroom: intro.text:
While walking the castle you find something that calls your atention.

There is a room that seems "less dusty" than the rest of the castle.

ops.text:
"HERE I COME!"

I will recklessly and brainlessly burst into the room.

Burst fist ask second, 
am I right?

This seems like a traveled space.

I would like to investigate please.

ev-bathroom: describe room.text:
The moment you step in, you get overwelmed by the smell of soap and 
the damp warmness 
of steam.

Your heart starts to pound hard in your chest.

ops.text:
Are you telling me that they here?

YES!! Ufff... 
Calm down...
Calm down...

Slow breaths...

I walk calmly to the dense mist of steam.

I don't hear anything...

I would like to check my suroundings before moving forward.

ev-bathroom: investigate door.text:
This seems to be a bathroom.

That explains the lack of dust.

ops.text:
Color me interested...

Lets dive into their throne.

I want to find them as fast as possible.

I have no time to enter in there.

I wasn't hoping they were taking a bath.

Shut up.

ev-bathroom: investigate bath.text:
The fog disipates.

You can see the gargantuan bath in the back.

Your hopes flatline when you realize it's only full of hot water.

ops.text:
I'll keep searching elsewhere.

They are in this castle...

And I will find them...

So...

In other words, you are telling me that I have a unlimited supply of dragon-bathwater?

Interesting...

I'll get closer to the bath, for no particular reason...

ev-bathroom: get in the fog.text:
This room was not big enough for you to 
barge in.

So as you faceplant to the gargantuan bathtub.

You sadly realize you are alone.

But it seems like the bath was used.
